name: synapse_search
description: Unified controller for file discovery, code search, and semantic retrieval. Supports 'files', 'code', 'hybrid', and 'find' modes.

name: synapse_symbol_query
description: Unified controller for static code intelligence. Jump to definitions, find callers, list implementations, or preview renames.

name: synapse_memory_manage
description: Unified controller for all memory mutations. Store fragments, update entries, manage relations, and capture task outcomes.

name: synapse_memory_query
description: Unified controller for memory retrieval. Recall context for tasks, list events, explore taxonomy, and query semantic similarity.

name: synapse_kg_manage
description: Unified controller for knowledge graph mutations. Add entities/triples, manage branches, and ingest documents into the graph.

name: synapse_kg_query
description: Unified controller for knowledge graph introspection. List entities, traverse relationships, and query temporal states (as_of).

name: synapse_workspace_manage
description: Unified controller for workspace operations. Explore project trees, read file chunks, and summarize project architecture.

name: synapse_system_manage
description: Unified controller for system maintenance. Manage semantic indices, run health audits, create backups, and update the server.

name: synapse_agent_prime
description: Mandatory task initialization. Rehydrates project context, recalled memories, and suggested actions in one call.

name: synapse_pageindex_tree
description: [PROTOTYPE] Generates a hierarchical TOC-style semantic tree for a document, allowing reasoning before reading.

name: synapse_pageindex_read_node
description: [PROTOTYPE] Reads the specific content of a node from a generated PageIndex tree using the node_id.

name: synapse_health
description: Returns a compact runtime health summary for fast smoke checks.
